creator: iio7@tutanota.com
text:
This is still present in FreeBSD 13.1.

Mar  9 19:42:27 foo bar[11119]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $ is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:27 foo bar[19213]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $wireguard_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:28 foo bar[41616]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $dbus_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:28 foo bar[42117]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $git_daemon_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:28 foo bar[44254]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $avahi_daemon_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:28 foo bar[45992]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $avahi_dnsconfd_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:28 foo bar[49875]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $clamav_clamd_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:28 foo bar[51553]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $clamav_freshclam_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
Mar  9 19:42:28 foo bar[52104]: /usr/sbin/service: WARNING: $clamav_milter_enable is not set properly - see rc.conf(5).
